steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The question states the goal: provide “a specific example of what municipalities provide.” The notes include this example: “One service they provide is water treatment.”

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content: C uses the specific service example (water treatment) to accomplish the stated goal. A provides population statistics, B describes municipality count, and D mentions services generally without naming a specific example. That matches choice C — C is correct.
